rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ROUPPET VS. FERGUS O'SULLIVAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 17, 2016 line 5. DEFENDANT FERGUS O'SULLIVAN, FOS TEAM, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to properly allege a written contract referenced in TAC paragraph 20, lines 23-24, e.g. parties to the contact, terms of the contract, etc. and the facts giving rise to the "established circumstances" (Opposition 5:23) under which this Plaintiff may enforce such contract. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion For Sanctions Regarding Defendant'S Compliance With The Court'S Order To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant'S Agent To Provide Plaintiff'S Counsel With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building No Later Than 4:00 Pm On Jul-19-2016 And Osc Re: Contempt.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 17, 2016 line 6. Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion For Sanctions Regarding Defendant'S Compliance With The Court'S Order To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant'S Agent To Provide Plaintiff'S Counsel With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building No Later Than 4:00 Pm On Jul-19-2016 And Osc Re: Contempt. Plaintiff to provide a supplemental declaration by 9:00 a.m. on October 17, 2016 regarding any developments re: gate lock since September 26, 2016. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: CHUN LEE ET AL. VS. ALEXANDRIA J GONZALEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 17, 2016 line 7. DEFENDANT DAVID RUIZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint alleges that defendants (including DOE defendants) are "former owner-occupants or the licensees, invites or houseguests of former owner." (Complaint, paragraph 5). The veracity of this allegation cannot be properly addressed by a demurrer. = (501/SRB)
